_comment_1: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your real values.
_comment_2: DO NOT commit config.json to git — add it to .gitignore.
_feed_url_offline_note: For offline testing, use a local path: /path/to/feed-digest.json

feishu._chat_id_howto: Run: lark-cli im chats list --as bot  — copy the oc_xxx ID of your target group

_lookback_note: How far back to consider articles when classifying. 48h is reasonable for daily reports.
